case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. JOJO GARCIA DEGUZMAN

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DEGUZMAN, JOJO GARCIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,775.87 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DEGUZMAN, JOJO GARCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2019 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JUL-30-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOJO GARCIA DEGUZMAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED TO CURE SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $150.00 SERVED MAY-01-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DEGUZMAN, JOJO GARCIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. REPRESENTED BY BERENICE MEDINA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOJO GARCIA DEGUZMAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $16.57 ACCRUED INTEREST, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,168.52 AS TO DEFENDANT DEGUZMAN, JOJO GARCIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEGUZMAN, JOJO GARCIA $1,775.87 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,950.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
